section_name: Refund by Motor Carriers Transporting Household Goods
text: The department may order a motor carrier that violates this chapter or a rule or order adopted under this chapter to pay a refund to a consumer who paid the motor carrier to transport household goods.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 643. Motor Carrier Registration
##### § 643.257 — Refund by Motor Carriers Transporting Household Goods

The department may order a motor carrier that violates this chapter or a rule or order adopted under this chapter to pay a refund to a consumer who paid the motor carrier to transport household goods.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B.604), Sec. 2.14, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: The department may order a motor carrier that violates this chapter or a rule or order adopted under this chapter to pay a refund to a consumer who paid the motor carrier to transport household goods.
